name: Tax Collector
description: The most hated person in any settlement who isn't actively committing crimes. Armed with a ledger, a guard escort, and the law.
dialogue_hooks: informing you that adventuring income is taxable
asking pointed questions about recent treasure acquisition
complaining that nobody appreciates the roads and walls taxes pay for
offering a 'reduced assessment' in exchange for a favor
voice_patterns: bureaucratic drone — every sentence cites a regulation
apologetic but firm — doesn't enjoy this, but the law is the law
aggressive enforcer — takes pleasure in finding discrepancies
weary civil servant — just trying to do the job and go home

schedule.afternoon: collecting door to door with guard escort
schedule.night: at home behind a locked door
